category_sources: Official homepage describes libcpucycles as understanding machine-level cycle counters and OS-level mechanisms.
source_facts.description says it is a microlibrary for counting CPU cycles.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and API docs use libcpucycles.
docs_sources: Official API page documents cpucycles functions and usage.
Official homepage is the project intro for libcpucycles.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository URL was found on the official cpucycles.cr.yp.to project/download documentation; official distribution is via release tarballs.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official API docs document cpucycles(), cpucycles_persecond(), and related timing functions.
source_facts.description and executables identify CPU cycle measurement tools.
